shell.headline: Command your industrial rise from a single responsive control surface.
shell.subheadline: This first frontend shell establishes routing, shared styling, and the core screens we will deepen in later tasks.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: See your operation at a glance, act on the next best move, and track what just changed.
dashboard.summaryCashBody: Liquid credits ready for market, production, and logistics.
dashboard.summaryResourceBody: {{resource}} is currently your largest visible stock line.

network.title: Economic network
network.subtitle: Your starter economy now has an anchor region, a trade outlet, and a connected industrial zone.

links.trade_flow: Raw materials and price signals flow toward the exchange.
links.logistics_flow: Stored goods can be repositioned instantly across your first logistics line.

activities.ironridge: Heavy extraction and first-stage metal throughput define this region.
activities.greenhaven: Timber and agrarian flow support stable starter logistics.
activities.sunbarrel: Energy extraction and industrial scaling dominate the local economy.
activities.riverplain: Balanced river commerce keeps this region flexible and trade-ready.
activities.trade_hub: Best place to read the market, fill orders, and react to price pressure.
activities.primary_storage: This is where freshly claimed goods and bought materials stay closest to your operation.
activities.remote_storage: Use this zone to reposition stock and stage your first logistics decisions.

specialties.ironridge: Signature output: iron ore and foundry freight.
specialties.greenhaven: Signature output: wood and agricultural support goods.
specialties.sunbarrel: Signature output: crude oil and industrial energy feedstock.
specialties.riverplain: Signature output: water-linked trade and balanced staple goods.

dashboard.commandCenterTitle: Take the next economic action now
dashboard.commandCenterBody: Extract, trade, produce, and transfer from one control surface without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.nextActionPlaceExtractorBody: Start your live loop by placing the starter extractor from the extractor panel.
dashboard.nextActionClaimExtractionBody: Production is ready. Claim your extracted resource to convert output into usable inventory.
dashboard.nextActionPlaceProcessingBody: Your extractor is online. Place the starter processing installation to unlock starter transforms.
dashboard.nextActionClaimTransformBody: A processing batch is complete. Claim the output to move it into inventory.
dashboard.nextActionStartTransformBody: Inputs are available. Start the starter transform to convert raw ore into processed output.
dashboard.nextActionFallbackBody: No urgent step is detected right now. Check inventory, transform readiness, and recent activity before acting.
dashboard.progressSetupFoundationBody: Your operation profile is ready. The starter extractor still needs to be placed.
dashboard.progressExtractionOnlineBody: The extractor is active and producing your first resource stream.
dashboard.progressFirstStockSecuredBody: Starter inventory is now populated from your live economic actions.
dashboard.progressProcessingOnlineBody: The starter processing installation is placed and connected to your loop.
dashboard.progressTransformationActiveBody: A starter transform batch is now running in your industrial line.
dashboard.progressProcessedOutputSecuredBody: Your loop has already produced processed goods and recorded the result.
dashboard.previewBanner: Preview mode is active. Real dashboard data will replace these values as soon as you sign in.
dashboard.previewActionHint: Quick actions stay visible here for orientation, but they only activate after sign-in.
dashboard.previewFeedback: {{action}} is highlighted in preview mode. Sign in to execute it for real.
dashboard.extractSuccessDetailed: Extractor placed. Production is now online.
dashboard.marketContextEmptySell: No tradable inventory is staged in {{location}} yet. Transfer stock there first.
dashboard.signInRequired: Sign in from Settings to view your dashboard.
dashboard.bootstrapRequired: Finish onboarding to unlock your first extractor and inventory.
dashboard.processingInstallationOnline: Processing installation is placed and ready for starter workflows.
dashboard.processingInstallationMissing: Place your first processing installation to anchor your starter processing line.
dashboard.processingInstallationNeedsExtractor: Place your first extractor before adding a processing installation.
dashboard.emptyInventory: Your warehouses are empty. Claim production from your extractor to stock your first resources.
dashboard.quickActionsSubtitle: Start the next real economic action directly from this screen.
dashboard.quickExtractReady: Your extractor is online. Claim output as soon as production is ready.
dashboard.quickExtractEmpty: Place your first extractor to start the live resource loop.
dashboard.quickSellBody: Convert inventory into credits without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.quickBuyBody: Use market offers to restock raw materials immediately.
dashboard.emptyTransforms: No transform recipes are available for your current starter structure yet.
dashboard.productionStructureRequired: Place your first extractor before starting processed production.
dashboard.logisticsEmptySource: The selected source location does not currently hold any resources.
dashboard.logisticsInstant: Transfers complete instantly in this MVP.
dashboard.transformReadyToStart: Input inventory is ready. Start the transform batch when you want to process materials.
dashboard.transformProcessingInstallationRequired: Place your starter processing installation before starting this transform.
dashboard.transformMissingInput: Need {{amount}} more {{resource}} to start this transform.
dashboard.noExtractor: Place your first extractor from onboarding to begin production.
dashboard.emptyLedger: No ledger activity yet. Claim production or sell resources to start your activity feed.
dashboard.marketSnapshotSubtitle: Check baseline prices and your latest limit orders before making the next move.
dashboard.marketRegionalOpportunitySubtitle: Use location pricing to spot simple buy, move, and sell routes before the spread closes.
dashboard.marketRegionalOpportunityAction: Buy {{resource}} in {{buyLocation}}, then move it toward {{sellLocation}}.

marketRegionalOpportunityCategoryHint.safe: Strong return for the capital currently tied up.
marketRegionalOpportunityCategoryHint.balanced: A workable route with moderate capital pressure.
marketRegionalOpportunityCategoryHint.aggressive: Thin return or high capital pressure for this route.

dashboard.marketRegionalLocalState: Saved locally in this browser for this prototype session.
dashboard.marketRegionalInsufficientCapital: Insufficient capital. You need {{required}} to run this route, but only {{available}} is available.
dashboard.marketRegionalSessionSubtitle: Small local targets that turn trade simulations into a guided playtest run.
dashboard.marketRegionalSessionCompleted: Session objectives complete. You have a profitable local trading run to build from.
dashboard.marketRegionalDraftSimulation: Simulation only. This prepares a route preview without executing a real trade.
dashboard.recommendedActionSubtitle: Start from the strongest immediate use of your capital, then open secondary routes only if you need more detail.
dashboard.recommendedActionSupport: Use this as your main move, then inspect secondary routes only if you want alternatives.
dashboard.primaryActionWhatHappensRegional: Buy {{resource}} in {{buyLocation}}, transfer it, and sell in {{sellLocation}} for an estimated net profit of {{profit}}.
dashboard.primaryActionWhatHappensTransformation: Convert {{inputResource}} into {{outputResource}} and sell in {{sellLocation}} for an estimated net profit of {{profit}}.
dashboard.draftOutcomeRegional: Move {{quantity}} {{resource}} using {{capital}} capital. Estimated net profit: {{profit}}.
dashboard.draftOutcomeTransformation: Run {{runs}} transformation(s) converting {{inputResource}} to {{outputResource}} using {{capital}} total capital. Estimated net profit: {{profit}}.
dashboard.commitResultSubtitle: Your capital has been permanently updated for this session.
dashboard.bestEconomicMovesSubtitle: A compact shortlist of the strongest immediate uses of your capital across trade and transformation.
dashboard.bestEconomicMovesEmpty: No strong move is standing out right now.
dashboard.marketTransformationSubtitle: Some routes are stronger when you refine the material before selling it.
dashboard.marketTransformationAction: Buy {{inputResource}} in {{buyLocation}}, refine it, then sell {{outputResource}} in {{sellLocation}}.
dashboard.marketTransformationValueAddHint: Estimated value added vs moving the raw input: {{value}}
dashboard.marketTransformationDraftSubtitle: Frontend-only preview of the batch economics. No production queue or real execution is created.
dashboard.marketWatchOrder: {{resource}} has an attractive {{side}} order to watch.
dashboard.networkCompactSummary: {{count}} connected locations available in your current network.
dashboard.inventoryCompactSummary: {{topCount}} top items visible, {{total}} total units tracked.
dashboard.activityCollapsedHint: Recent actions are available when you need confirmation of gains, losses, and timing.
dashboard.marketSnapshotCompactSummary: {{offers}} offers and {{watchlist}} watch items ready when you expand the market view.
dashboard.marketRegionalCompactSummary: {{count}} regional routes available in the current market pulse.

onboarding.title: Choose your region
onboarding.subtitle: Pick the territory that will anchor your first industrial foothold. This step stays light for now, but the choice preview should already feel clear on mobile.
onboarding.selectionPreviewBody: Your chosen region will feed the upcoming player bootstrap flow, starter package grant, and first extractor placement steps.
onboarding.selectionHint: This choice is now saved through the backend bootstrap flow and will stay tied to your signed-in profile.
onboarding.signInRequired: Sign in from Settings before completing onboarding.
onboarding.completedBody: Your region is locked in and your starter package has been granted. The next onboarding tasks can now place your first extractor.
onboarding.alreadyBootstrapped: This account has already completed bootstrap.

market.title: Market
market.signInRequired: Sign in from Settings to sell your inventory.
market.bootstrapRequired: Finish onboarding before opening the market.

contextDescriptions.region_anchor: Buying near your regional anchor keeps raw-material access cheaper and closer to extraction.
contextDescriptions.trade_hub: The Trade Hub rewards processed goods and stronger sale prices, but getting there takes logistics.

market.buySubtitle: Instant system buys include a small premium over baseline prices; limit orders can be cheaper.
market.orderSubtitle: Place a conservative buy or sell order at your chosen price, including inside the instant-trade spread.
market.orderStatusHelp: This {{status}} order will stay open unless a compatible opposite order fills it immediately.
market.emptyOrders: You have not placed any limit orders yet.
market.sellSubtitle: Instant system sells include a small discount from baseline prices; limit orders can return more.
market.emptyInventory: You have no inventory ready to sell yet. Claim production from the dashboard first.
market.emptyInventoryContext: You have no tradable inventory staged in {{location}} yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.linkSent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.

ironridge.name: Ironridge
ironridge.description: A hard-edged frontier of ridgelines, foundries, and freight corridors built for early industrial expansion.

greenhaven.name: Greenhaven
greenhaven.description: A fertile logistics basin where farmland, timber routes, and river access support a steady early start.

sunbarrel.name: Sunbarrel
sunbarrel.description: A dry extraction belt with strong energy potential and wide-open space for scaling your first facilities.

riverplain.name: Riverplain
riverplain.description: A broad trade plain tied together by water routes and settlement hubs that favor balanced growth.

ironridge_iron_extractor.name: Ironridge Ore Extractor
ironridge_iron_extractor.description: A rugged starter extractor tuned for Ironridge ore seams and early industrial throughput.

greenhaven_timber_extractor.name: Greenhaven Timber Extractor
greenhaven_timber_extractor.description: A compact forestry extractor built for Greenhaven's steady timber output.

sunbarrel_oil_extractor.name: Sunbarrel Oil Extractor
sunbarrel_oil_extractor.description: A starter derrick platform for Sunbarrel crude fields with higher upkeep but strong output.

riverplain_water_extractor.name: Riverplain Water Extractor
riverplain_water_extractor.description: A low-maintenance intake platform designed for Riverplain's connected water routes.

starter_processing_installation.name: Starter Processing Installation
starter_processing_installation.description: A compact starter workshop that anchors your first processing operations.

starter_grant.title: Starter package granted
starter_grant.description: Your corporation received its initial funding package.

build.title: Building placed
build.description: A new building was placed and linked to your industrial network.

upgrade.title: Building upgraded
upgrade.description: A building upgrade was recorded in your ledger.

production_transform_started.title: Transform started
production_transform_started.description: A production batch for {{resource}} was started.

market_sell.title: Resource sold
market_sell.description: {{resource}} sold on the market for a credit return.

market_fee.title: Market fee charged
market_fee.description: A market fee was applied to your recent {{resource}} sale.

maintenance.title: Maintenance paid
maintenance.description: A maintenance expense was recorded for your operation.

extract_resource.title: Extract a resource
extract_resource.description: Start your first real economic activity by placing an extractor and beginning resource extraction.
extract_resource.objective: Place your first extractor so your operation can extract a resource.

claim_resource.title: Claim your resource
claim_resource.description: Extraction only becomes useful once the produced material is collected into your storage.
claim_resource.objective: Claim the first produced resource from your extractor.

open_inventory.title: Open inventory
open_inventory.description: Inventory is your source of truth for owned materials. Review what you extracted before trading.
open_inventory.objective: Open the dashboard inventory and confirm the extracted resource is there.

sell_resource.title: Sell a resource
sell_resource.description: Selling converts stored output into credits and shows how the market closes the first profit loop.
sell_resource.objective: Sell a resource from your inventory on the market.

buy_resource.title: Buy a resource
buy_resource.description: Use your credits to buy a resource from the market and confirm the purchase lands in inventory.
buy_resource.objective: Buy a resource from the market.

produce_resource.title: Produce an ingot
produce_resource.description: Production creates value by transforming raw materials into processed goods.
produce_resource.objective: Run the Iron Ore to Iron Ingot production job.

transfer_resource.title: Transfer a resource
transfer_resource.description: Logistics moves materials between locations and prepares the next layer of economic play.
transfer_resource.objective: Transfer a resource from one storage location to another.

complete.title: Starter loop complete
complete.description: You completed the first economic loop: extraction, claim, inventory, sale, purchase, production, and logistics. Industrial Dominion rewards players who understand how these systems connect.

ironridge_iron_ingot_batch.name: Iron ingot batch
ironridge_iron_ingot_batch.description: Refine a starter batch of iron ore into a smaller volume of industrial iron ingots.

iron_ingot_from_iron_ore.name: Iron ingot run
iron_ingot_from_iron_ore.description: Convert a small batch of iron ore into iron ingots using the simplest possible starter production flow.

gameplayErrors.missingApiBaseUrl: The game client is missing its API connection settings.
gameplayErrors.bootstrapRequired: Finish onboarding before using this gameplay action.
gameplayErrors.firstExtractorAlreadyPlaced: Your first extractor has already been placed.
gameplayErrors.firstProcessingInstallationAlreadyPlaced: Your first processing installation has already been placed.
gameplayErrors.extractorRegionMismatch: This extractor does not match your selected region.
gameplayErrors.unknownStarterExtractor: This starter extractor could not be identified.
gameplayErrors.unknownStarterProcessingInstallation: This starter processing installation could not be identified.
gameplayErrors.invalidFirstProcessingInstallationPayloa: The processing installation request was invalid. Try selecting the installation again.
gameplayErrors.extractorNotFound: The selected extractor could not be found for your corporation.
gameplayErrors.processingInstallationNeedsExtractor: Place your first extractor before adding a processing installation.
gameplayErrors.productionNotReady: No production is ready to claim yet.
gameplayErrors.invalidStarterExtractor: This building cannot use the starter production claim flow.
gameplayErrors.invalidBootstrapPayload: The onboarding request was invalid. Try selecting your region again.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketBuyPayload: The buy order was invalid. Adjust the quantity and try again.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketOrderPayload: The limit order was invalid. Check the side, price, and quantity, then try again.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketSellPayload: The sell order was invalid. Adjust the quantity and try again.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketOrderPrice: Choose a limit price greater than zero.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketOrderQuantity: Choose an order quantity greater than zero.
gameplayErrors.invalidMarketOrderSide: Choose a valid order side before placing the limit order.
gameplayErrors.invalidLogisticsTransferPayload: The transfer request was invalid. Check the locations and quantity, then try again.
gameplayErrors.invalidTransformStartPayload: The transform request was invalid. Try selecting the recipe again.
gameplayErrors.invalidTransformClaimPayload: The transform claim request was invalid. Try again.
gameplayErrors.invalidProductionJobPayload: The production request was invalid. Adjust the recipe or run count and try again.
gameplayErrors.notEnoughCredits: You do not have enough credits to complete that purchase.
gameplayErrors.notEnoughInventory: You do not have enough inventory to complete that sale.
gameplayErrors.notEnoughTransformInput: You do not have enough input inventory to start that transform.
gameplayErrors.notEnoughProductionInput: You do not have enough iron ore to start that production run.
gameplayErrors.resourceNotFound: That resource could not be found.
gameplayErrors.resourceNotPurchasable: That resource cannot be purchased on the market.
gameplayErrors.resourceNotTradable: That resource cannot be sold on the market.
gameplayErrors.invalidTransferQuantity: Choose a transfer quantity greater than zero.
gameplayErrors.transferLocationsMustDiffer: Choose two different locations for the transfer.
gameplayErrors.transferSourceNotFound: The source location could not be found.
gameplayErrors.transferDestinationNotFound: The destination location could not be found.
gameplayErrors.notEnoughTransferInventory: The selected source location does not have enough inventory for that transfer.
gameplayErrors.transformRecipeNotFound: That transform recipe could not be found.
gameplayErrors.productionRecipeNotFound: That production recipe could not be found.
gameplayErrors.productionStructureNotFound: You need a placed production structure before using this recipe.
gameplayErrors.processingInstallationRequiredForProduct: Place your starter processing installation before starting this production.
gameplayErrors.invalidProductionRuns: Choose a production run count greater than zero.
gameplayErrors.transformBuildingNotFound: The selected building could not run that transform.
gameplayErrors.transformRecipeNotAllowed: That recipe does not match your current starter building.
gameplayErrors.transformAlreadyActive: A transform batch is already active for this building.
gameplayErrors.transformJobNotFound: That transform batch could not be found.
gameplayErrors.transformNotReady: That transform batch is not ready to claim yet.
gameplayErrors.transformAlreadyClaimed: That transform batch has already been claimed.
gameplayErrors.invalidSellQuantity: Choose a sell quantity greater than zero.
gameplayErrors.generic: Something went wrong in the starter gameplay flow. Please try again.

startup.headline: Industrial Dominion network initialized
startup.body: Regional command channels are now online. Founding operators can begin extraction, trading, and expansion from their first foothold.

market.headline: Starter commodity desks are now open
market.body: The system market is accepting early raw-material sales at baseline prices, with standard exchange fees applied to each filled order.
